articles.title: Software Gains as Guggenheim Says AI No ‘Death Knell’ for Sector
articles.summary: Software shares rose in premarket trading after Guggenheim upgraded a trio of companies, saying fears that artificial intelligence poses a mortal threat to the sector are overdone.

articles.title: Coffee, Sugar Extend Rally as Adverse Weather Fuels Supply Fears
articles.summary: Coffee and sugar futures extended gains in New York and London as unfavorable weather in key growing regions heightened supply concerns.

articles.title: Wayve Files for Share Sale on LSE’s New Private Market
